name: Nachos, Danny Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the salsa ingredients in a bowl. This can be done ahead of time so the flavors have time to meld.
2. Cut the tortillas into quarters and place them on a baking sheet. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes until crispy.
3. Spoon some salsa onto each chip and top with shredded cheese. Place under broiler until cheese melts, approximately 2 minutes.
4. Serve extra chips alongside with the remaining salsa.
